name: Hancock Public School
message: Hancock Public School is a K-12 educational institution that emphasizes excellence in education, as evidenced by its recognition with the National Blue Ribbon School Award. The school serves students from preschool through high school and offers a variety of academic programs and extracurricular activities, including sports. It aims to foster a supportive community for families and encourages student achievement through various awards and recognition programs. Hancock Public School is dedicated to creating a positive impact on its students and the broader community
